subject: Fwd: ARTICLE
body:
what is with you ?  If I don't hear back , I feel somethng  happening .
R U  Okay ?  Don't say yes if  not so fab . But  say something , please .
BEST,
Marcia M.    (if you feel better or more  comfortable/safer , talking 
-954-296-0002)

From: Maemarcia@aol.com
Subject: ARTICLE
Date: Tue, 18 Dec 2007 14:18:52 GMT
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com

Could not get full article.  What I read , with the  exception of what 
appears to still be in your future, (?)   unfortunately ,  to my knowledge, was 
'clever" -  the "genious" line  response ,  and the "mother" reference - rather 
cute  , ("son-ish)  in  light of the situation.  
[ Can't totally take "the BROOKLYN"  out of the  boy ! ]  And , yes to , 
"private" not ... secretive.
  
If anyone can make it through you can ; YOu know I'm on your  team.
Thought i'd make it up for a few days this week because I sent my  man to ski.
I was able to get  a fare up to NY  but couldn't afford  to get back so that 
didn't work.
Feel we'll talk soon.
YES ?
 
Marcia M.
